title: Add retry logic (3 attempts) to oscore_ctx_persist_ssn on NVM write failure
description: Implement up to 3 retries with backoff in oscore_ctx_persist_ssn() before returning OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED. Update function at lines ~910+. Reference security reqs for persistence.
close_reason: Implemented 3-attempt retry with backoff and updated security references in docs
